overall_correctness.description: Single summary judgment of the change/plan under review.

findings.description: Every problem found, one entry each. Empty array means nothing found.

priority.description: 0=CRITICAL (correctness/security, must fix) 1=IMPORTANT (real bug or risk) 2=MINOR (should fix) 3=NIT (style/advisory)

code_location.description: file:line the finding anchors to, or empty if N/A.

body.description: What is wrong and why; concrete failure scenario.
